html:
Exclusive to:

This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.

Aloe is a Vegetable Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It can be obtained from the planted version of Aloe

Contents

  • 1 Cooked Aloe
  • 2 Planted
  • 3 Usage
  • 4 Tips

Cooked Aloe

Cooked Aloe is a Vegetable Food item made by Cooking Aloe on a Campfire, Fire Pit, or other viable source of fire. It restores 3 HP and 12.5 Hunger.

Planted

Aloe as a plant is a structure that can be found growing in the ground similar to Carrots. It can also be grown in a Farm.

Usage

Tips

  • Wagstaff loses three health whenever he eats raw food, so aloe only heals him for five health.
  • Since Aloe increases health by a moderate amount, it can be a good way to increase health on the go.
Food and Edible ItemsStructures

"aloe"
“Scientifical and nutritional.”
–Wilson
“Gross. It's all gooey inside.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang eat everything.”
–Wolfgang
“It dies so that others may live.”
–Wendy
“GREEN ENERGY ACQUIRED”
–WX-78
“Aloe. A plant with many uses.”
–Wickerbottom
“I hear aloe's good for you.”
–Woodie
“I should eat it.”
–Maxwell
“Theoretically, consuming this has health benefits. But it only causes me pain.”
–Wagstaff
“Bah! There is nö meat in here!”
–Wigfrid
“I bet this is good for us.”
–Webber
“Aloe's good for everything.”
–Walani
“Perhaps there's a drink I put this into.”
–Warly
“Thar be gooey treasure within.”
–Woodlegs
“"'TIS A PLANT O' NUM NUMS"”
–Wilba
“Clumpy friend”
–Wormwood
“Low cost medicine.”
–Wheeler
Aloe is a Vegetable Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It can be obtained from the planted version of Aloe

“I cooked it!”
–Wilson
“I put fire on it.”
–Willow
“It make Wolfgang big and strong.”
–Wolfgang
“Cooked cactus.”
–Wendy
“GREEN ENERGY FRICASSEED”
–WX-78
“It's been known to have laxative properties.”
–Wickerbottom
“I guess I can eat it.”
–Woodie
“I should eat it.”
–Maxwell
“Presumably some of its health benefits have been retained.”
–Wagstaff
“It lacks meat!”
–Wigfrid
“I cooked it!”
–Webber
“Yummy!”
–Walani
“I can add this to something.”
–Warly
“'Tis bubbletea treasure.”
–Woodlegs
“"'TIS A FWOOSH'DED PLANT"”
–Wilba
“Squishy”
–Wormwood
“I cooked away some of the medication.”
–Wheeler
Cooked Aloe is a Vegetable Food item made by Cooking Aloe on a Campfire, Fire Pit, or other viable source of fire. It restores 3 HP and 12.5 Hunger.
Planted[edit | edit source]
Aloe
Object Info
Can be Burned
Source
Can be picked ()
“A plant with many uses.”
–Wilson
“I could eat that.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang pick it.”
–Wolfgang
“What is that doing here?”
–Wendy
“BIOLOGICAL ENERGY”
–WX-78
“That will certainly come in handy.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like a plant, eh?”
–Woodie
“It's a plant with many medicinal uses.”
–Maxwell
“Fascinating! I've never seen one of those thriving in the wild before.”
–Wagstaff
“A meatless living thing!”
–Wigfrid
“Oh wow. Aloe is good for lots of stuff.”
–Webber
“Hey little aloe plant.”
–Walani
“A plant of many uses. And recipes.”
–Warly
“Land seaweed.”
–Woodlegs
“CAN'ST WILBA EAT-ETH?”
–Wilba
“Having fun in dirt”
–Wormwood
“I'll take that, thank you very much.”
–Wheeler
Aloe as a plant is a structure that can be found growing in the ground similar to Carrots. It can also be grown in a Farm.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Tips[edit | edit source]
Wagstaff loses three health whenever he eats raw food, so aloe only heals him for five health.
Since Aloe increases health by a moderate amount, it can be a good way to increase health on the go.

* Since Aloe increases health by a moderate amount, it can be a good way to increase health on the go.
